message:
feat(core): add shortest_path module with graph pathfinding algorithms

Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford, BFS, Floyd-Warshall, k-shortest paths (Yen),
graph diameter. WeightedGraph with non-negative weight detection.
30 inline tests + 32 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
